# barracudawaf_custom_attack_type (Resource)

`barracudawaf_custom_attack_type` manages `Custom Attack Type` on the Barracuda Web Application Firewall.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "barracudawaf_custom_attack_type" "test_attack_type" {
    name = "test_custom_attack"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- **name** (String) Attack Data Type Name
